query:
SELECT c.id as country_id, c.name as country_name FROM countries c WHERE c.name = 'Inglaterra';
SELECT l.id, l.name, l.division, l.countryId FROM leagues l WHERE l.countryId = (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE name = 'Inglaterra') ORDER BY l.division;
